default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Rimkus content performance and align on reporting and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Reporting will now feature "double-click" wins** (e.g., specific Google SERP/AI screenshots) for quick, high-impact updates to leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Forensics content will be prioritized** to balance the 42 BES vs. 10 Forensics article gap; the new cadence is 3 Forensics articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**LLM visibility tracking will be overhauled** in GrowthX's new "Check That AI" tool to align with Rimkus's "Profound" platform and enable accurate, segmented competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**Forensics content strategy will shift** from legal topics to high-level, informational "what is" guides, requiring a working session between Matt and Jen.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

## Topics

### Reporting & Performance

  - [GrowthX presented a new reporting snapshot designed for weekly/bi-weekly updates.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Traffic:** 100% week-on-week growth in overall sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [**Keyword Performance:** Gained \~30 new AI overview positions since December.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [**Competitive Visibility:** 7% visibility growth vs. competitors since October (Rimkus: 11% presence vs. competitors: 2%).](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [**Feedback → Action:**](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Need:** Leadership requires quick, high-impact wins for brief updates.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Action:** Reports will feature specific examples (e.g., "Google 'building condition assessment' → see Rimkus at the top").](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)

### LLM Visibility Tracking

  - [**Problem:** Current tracking in "Scrunch" mixes BES and Forensics competitors, inflating performance metrics for Forensics prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX's new tool, "Check That AI," will enable segmented tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [**Goal:** Align tracking prompts between "Check That AI" and Rimkus's "Profound" platform to ensure shared goals.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

### Content Strategy & Alignment

  - [**Forensics Content Gap:** 42 BES vs. 10 Forensics articles published.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
      - [**Decision:** Prioritize Forensics (3 articles/week) to balance the gap.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Forensics Topic Misalignment:**](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Problem:** Topics are drifting toward legal requirements, which Jen cannot technically review.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
      - [**Solution:** Shift focus to high-level, informational "what is" guides.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
      - [**Action:** Jen and Matt will hold a working session to align on new topics.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**BES Topic Alignment:**](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Nohora confirmed BES topics are well-aligned with business needs.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

### Conversion Tracking

  - [**Goal:** Align on conversion metrics beyond GA4 to hone strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [**Rimkus's Primary Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
      - [**Ultimate:** Job submissions via forms.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
      - [**Interim:** Engaged sessions, time on page, and CTA clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [**Action:** Matt may invite Alicia (Rimkus) to a future call for a deeper dive into conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [Update reporting snapshot with "double-click" wins.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [Schedule a strategic dive into LLM visibility with Jen and Nohora.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
      - [Onboard Jen and Nohora to "Check That AI" next week.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [**Jen & Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Schedule a 30-min working session to align on Forensics content topics.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Jen:**](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)
      - [Share guidance and materials for new Forensics topics.](https://fathom.video/share/H4vgMjaaMSrhKqsF1BPtALRqF6QbwsGG?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)

action_items.description: Publish 3 forensic articles/week until caught up
Email Jen/Nohora updated reporting snapshot w/ double-click examples
Email Jen Forensics Q1/Q2 research view link
